ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patches" (
  "patch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patch */,
  "patch_name" TEXT /* Name of the patch file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the patch */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author who submitted the patch */,
  "forwarded" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the patch has been forwarded to other teams */,
  "origin" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin of the patch */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the patch */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the patch */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes for the patch */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the patch is associated with */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of dependencies for the patch */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the patch (e.g., pending, reviewed, applied) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the patch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patches_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patches_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES patch_origin ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the author belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the author was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the author's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bugs" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug */,
  "bug_description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "patch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patch intended to fix the bug */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bug (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the bug is associated with */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the bug (e.g., critical, high, medium, low) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the bug */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the bug was first reported */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the bug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_patch_id FOREIGN KEY ("patch_id") REFERENCES patches ("patch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patch_origin" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin (e.g., internal, upstream) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the origin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the origin was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the origin information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patch_forwarding" (
  "forwarding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forwarding event */,
  "patch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patch being forwarded */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team receiving the patch */,
  "forward_date" TEXT /* Date when the patch was forwarded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the forwarding (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the forwarding event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the forwarding event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forwarding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patch_forwarding_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patch_forwarding_patch_id FOREIGN KEY ("patch_id") REFERENCES patches ("patch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the team's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patch being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the patch */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the patch was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patch_id FOREIGN KEY ("patch_id") REFERENCES patches ("patch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
